## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:

## Definition of Done (Frontend)

- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes in `web/`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes in `web/`
- [ ] `npm run build` passes in `web/`

## Accessibility checklist

- [ ] Interactive elements are keyboard reachable (Tab/Shift+Tab) and visibly focused
- [ ] Form controls have explicit labels and error messages are announced clearly
- [ ] Images/icons have meaningful `alt` text, or are marked decorative
- [ ] Color contrast is sufficient and information is not color-only
- [ ] Headings are hierarchical and landmarks are used (`main`, `nav`, `footer`, etc.)

## Performance budget evidence

- [ ] Home (`/`) meets LCP <= 2.5s, INP <= 200ms, CLS <= 0.1 (mobile)
- [ ] Discover list (`/discover`) meets LCP <= 2.5s, INP <= 200ms, CLS <= 0.1 (mobile)
- [ ] One detail page meets LCP <= 2.5s, INP <= 200ms, CLS <= 0.1 (mobile)
- [ ] No unreviewed heavy third-party scripts were added
